xml.raw:
<Policy>
  <Parser parser_key="{@parser_key}" type="1" separator="Key&Value2" arr_length="-1">
    <Field position="0"  name="date" />
    <Field position="1"  name="time" />
    <Field position="2"  name="device_name"    org_name="devname" />
    <Field position="3"  name="device_id"      org_name="devid" />
    <Field position="4"  name="logid" />
    <Field position="5"  name="type" />
    <Field position="6"  name="subtype" />
    <Field position="7"  name="eventtype" />
    <Field position="8"  name="level" />
    <Field position="9"  name="vd" />
    <Field position="10" name="severity" />
    <Field position="11" name="src_ip"          org_name="srcip" />
    <Field position="12" name="src_country"     org_name="srccountry" />
    <Field position="13" name="dstn_ip"         org_name="dstip" />
    <Field position="14" name="src_if"          org_name="srcintf" />
    <Field position="15" name="dstn_if"         org_name="dstintf" />
    <Field position="16" name="policyid" />
    <Field position="17" name="sessionid" />
    <Field position="18" name="action" />
    <Field position="19" name="prtc"            org_name="proto" />
    <Field position="20" name="service" />
    <Field position="21" name="attack_nm"       org_name="attack" />
    <Field position="22" name="src_port"        org_name="srcport" />
    <Field position="23" name="dstn_port"       org_name="dstport" />
    <Field position="24" name="hostname" />
    <Field position="25" name="direction" />
    <Field position="26" name="attackid" />
    <Field position="27" name="profile" />
    <Field position="28" name="ref" />
    <Field position="29" name="incidentserialno" />
    <Field position="30" name="msg"             convert_tag="[[@toLowerCase()]]" />
    <Field position="31" name="crscore" />
    <Field position="32" name="crlevel" />
    <Field position="33" name="vendor"          convert_tag="[[@set('fortinet')]]" />
    <Field position="34" name="model"           convert_tag="[[@set('fgt')]]" />
    <Field position="35" name="logtype"         convert_tag="[[@set('threat')]]" />
    <Field position="36" name="parser_version"  convert_tag="[[@set('v2')]]" />
    <Field position="37" name="original_log"    convert_tag="[[@originalLog()]]" />
    <Field position="38" name="parser_info"     convert_tag="[[@set('[Fortinet]_fgt_traffic_v2_keyvalue')]]" />
    <Field position="39" name="eqp_type"        convert_tag="[[@set('fw')]]" />
  </Parser>
</Policy>
